chat.initialMsg:
Hello! I'm your **AI Copilot** powered by Gemini. I have full context on your startup metrics, roadmap progress, pitch deck scores, and digital footprint.

How can I help you today? You can ask me to analyze your metrics, review your pitch positioning, or plan your next fundraising steps.

What should I focus on to reach investment readiness faster?
Review my pitch deck score and suggest improvements
What are the biggest risks investors might see in my startup?

FounderLegal.title: Legal Toolkit
FounderLegal.subtitle: Legal templates, checklists, and answers to questions — everything to launch and grow a startup

d1.title: NDA (Non-Disclosure Agreement)
d1.description: Bilateral confidentiality agreement for negotiations with partners and investors. Adapted for Kazakhstan and Uzbekistan legislation.

d2.title: SAFE Agreement
d2.description: Standard SAFE agreement to raise seed investments. Adapted version of Y Combinator SAFE for CA jurisdictions.

d3.title: Term Sheet
d3.description: Term Sheet template with key terms: valuation, participation, veto rights, anti-dilution, and liquidation preference.

d4.title: Employment Contract for IT Specialist (UZ)
d4.description: Employment contract with a technical specialist under the laws of Uzbekistan with NDA and IP assignment clauses.

d5.title: Co-founder Agreement
d5.description: Regulates equity distribution, vesting, roles, and co-founder exit procedures. Critical at early stages.

d6.title: IP Assignment Agreement
d6.description: Transfer of intellectual property rights from developers and employees to the company.

d7.title: SaaS Customer Agreement
d7.description: Standard agreement for using a SaaS product: terms of use, SLA, liability, data.

d8.title: Advisor Agreement + Vesting
d8.description: Agreement with an advisor: role, compensation via equity/SAFENote + cliff + vesting schedule.

d9.title: Contractor Agreement
d9.description: Agreement with a freelancer or contractor: deliverables, payment, IP assignment, confidentiality.

d10.title: Shareholder Agreement
d10.description: Shareholder agreement: protection of minority rights, drag-along, tag-along, right of first refusal mechanisms.

steps.text: Choose a company name (check uniqueness on egov.kz)
steps.detail: Use the egov.kz portal → Business → Registration of Legal Entity

steps.text: Prepare constituent documents (Charter)
steps.detail: Minimum charter capital for an LLP is 0 tenge (since 2021)

steps.text: Register via eGov (3-5 business days)
Open a bank account
steps.detail: Kaspi Business, Halyk Bank, or Jusan — fastest for startups

steps.text: Register as a taxpayer with the State Revenue Committee
Choose a tax regime (Standard or Simplified)
steps.detail: Simplified tax regime: 3% of income, reporting every six months

steps.text: Obtain an EDS (Electronic Digital Signature)
Optional: apply for Astana Hub residency (0% taxes)
Check the name on the mybusiness.uz website
Prepare the Charter and founders' decision
Pay the state fee (0.5 minimum wage)
Register via my.gov.uz (1-3 days)
Register with tax authorities, obtain a TIN (INN)
Open a bank account (Orient Finance, Kapitalbank — popular for IT)
Consider registration in IT Park Uzbekistan (0% tax)
Hire employees under employment contracts

c3.title: Become an IT Park Uzbekistan Resident

steps.text: Ensure activities match IT (software development, IT services, export)
Register on my.gov.uz and apply to IT Park
Pass project evaluation (online form + pitch if a grant is needed)
Receive a resident certificate (2-4 weeks)
Benefits: 0% income tax, 0% VAT, reduced insurance premiums
Annually confirm compliance with residency criteria
Clean up the cap table
Execute IP assignment from all co-founders and key developers
Sign a Co-founder Agreement with vesting (4-year / 1-year cliff)
Create a Data Room (pitch deck, financial model, metrics, legal documents)
Check for the absence of tax debts
Choose an investment vehicle (SAFE, convertible note, equity)
steps.detail: SAFE is the most standard and fastest tool for seed

steps.text: Consult with a lawyer on CA venture law
steps.detail: UNTITLED recommends: Nexum Legal, Aequitas Legal (KZ)

faq.q: Do I need a lawyer to register a company?
faq.a: For a simple LLP/LLC registration, a lawyer is not required — use our checklists and egov.kz / my.gov.uz portals. A lawyer is recommended for creating a Co-founder Agreement, executing investments, and IP protection.

faq.q: Which jurisdiction should I choose for my startup (KZ, UZ, or Delaware)?
faq.a: For the local market: LLP (KZ) or LLC (UZ). To attract foreign investors — Delaware C-Corp (USA) + subsidiary in CA. Most foreign VCs require a Delaware or Cayman Islands holding.

faq.q: What is a SAFE and how does it work?
faq.a: SAFE (Simple Agreement for Future Equity) is an instrument where an investor gives money now, and converts it into shares in the next round at a discount. It's simpler and faster than a direct sale of equity, and doesn't require company valuation.

faq.q: What is vesting and why is it important?
faq.a: Vesting is a mechanism where co-founders 'earn' their shares over time (usually 4 years with a 1-year cliff). It protects the company from a situation where a co-founder leaves after 3 months with a 30% stake.

faq.q: Do I need to sign an IP Assignment?
faq.a: Absolutely! IP Assignment ensures that all intellectual property (code, design, brand) belongs to the company, not individuals. This is critical for investor due diligence.
